programme.title: Baywatch - My Father the Hero

programme.title: Baywatch - Boiling Point
programme.desc: "Boiling Point" - Zack corrupts the headquarters’ computer system forcing everyone to work in the Dark Ages. Sean is freaked because a major donor is about to arrive in the midst of chaos. Jason saves Brit from her ex.

programme.title: Baywatch - The Return of Jessie
programme.desc: "The Return of Jessie" - Kekoa is devastated when Jessie tells JD that he’s the father of her child. A rescued body boarder is paralyzed. Sean has a romantic encounter with a beautiful, woman he thinks might really be Pele, the goddess fire.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Champagne High
programme.desc: "Champagne High" - Hanson, Penhall and Hoffs go undercover to solve a case involving multiple incidents of shoplifting and a stolen Porsche.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Brother Hanson and the Miracle of Renner's Pond
programme.desc: "Brother Hanson and the Miracle of Renner's Pond" - Hanson investigates an arson case involving a book burning and a science teacher that wants to teach creationism.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Raising Marijuana
programme.desc: "Raising Marijuana" - Hoffs goes undercover as a drug dealer's girlfriend but gets a little too close. Meanwhile, Penhall and Ioki pose as "twins" who want to help ship drugs.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Best Years of Your Life
programme.desc: "Best Years of Your Life" - Hanson and Penhall deal with a suicide while investigating a series of home break-ins.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Cory and Dean Got Married
programme.desc: "Cory and Dean Got Married" - Penhall and Hoffs work on a special detail assignment to transport a juvenile offender.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - School's Out
programme.desc: "School's Out" - Hanson investigates a series of bathroom bombings and the team disperses when the Jump Street Program is suspended for the summer.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - The Currency We Trade In
programme.desc: "The Currency We Trade In" - Penhall works on a Major Crimes case with his new partner, Fitzgerald. The case involves allegations of child abuse against a public figure.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Coach of the Year
programme.desc: "Coach of the Year" - Penhall and Booker investigate a football coach after a student is paralyzed in a game.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Whose Choice Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: "Whose Choice Is It Anyway?" - Hoffs goes undercover at a school clinic that gives teens information about birth control.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street - Hell Week
programme.desc: "Hell Week" - Hanson, Ioki and Booker go undercover in two fraternities to investigate a college rape case. Meanwhile, Hoffs goes undercover in a sorority and Penhall in a dorm.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Friday Night
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Wannabe (aka Friends 4Ever)
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool", wants to try out.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Cabaret
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Jagged Little Pill
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: When Doves Cry, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: When Doves Cry, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Karma Chameleon
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year never happened!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Secrets & Lies
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Coming of Age
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Rumours and Reputations
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T. if he thinks something could be going on with Liberty and Mr. Armstrong the math teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Cabaret

programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Highways and Byways
programme.desc: ''Highways and Byways'' - Five rescued shelter dogs will travel by any means necessary to get closer to their new forever families.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Bebe
programme.desc: ''Bebe'' - Brandon rescues a young Pit Bull that shows signs of separation anxiety and a possible history of abuse. But before he can transition this dog to her new forever home, he must gain her trust and train her on the 7 Common Commands.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Lacy
programme.desc: ''Lacy'' - A five-year-old German Shepherd could be the perfect match for a family still mourning the loss of their previous Shepherd. But before Lacy will be ready for her new home, she’ll need to overcome her distrust of other dogs and befriend the family’s current pack of two.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Special Services
programme.desc: ''Special Services'' - Five rescued shelter dogs learn skills that will make a huge difference in their potential adopters' lives.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Millie
programme.desc: ''Millie'' - After rescuing a shy and fearful one-year-old Terrier mix, Brandon calls upon some of the other ranch residents to help Millie overcome her fears and become a better match for a potential adopter.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Bo
programme.desc: ''Bo'' - A Toy Poodle mix could be the perfect match for a young girl who recently overcame a devastating illness. But only time will tell if Brandon can turn this energetic, young pup into a therapy dog.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Echo
programme.desc: ''Echo'' - A disabled veteran reaches out to Brandon for help, after losing his loyal service dog to a sudden illness. But before Brandon will consider an eleven-month-old Doberman Pinscher ready to assist with this call of duty, he’ll need to put the dog through basic training and prepare him for special services.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Leo
programme.desc: ''Leo'' - A young Labrador-Pointer mix is trained for teen sisters who want a mascot for their family’s band. With Eric’s help, this playful pup learns a special way to participate in upcoming shows by saying goodbye to his future fans.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Pixie
programme.desc: ''Pixie'' - A playful Poodle mix could be the perfect match for a single mom with two talented children. But, to make sure that this placement is a success, Eric must teach Pixie some tricks for fitting in with his new family.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Otis
programme.desc: ''Otis'' - A shy Spaniel mix could be the newest addition to a family that has two energetic young boys. But in order for Otis to fit in with his siblings, he must learn the importance of going to bed on cue.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Cheese
programme.desc: ''Cheese'' - A cute Corgi mix hopes to trade in his space at the shelter for a bungalow near the beach with an active, cycling couple. But to make this transition a success, Cheese must be willing to sit back and go along for the ride.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Annie
programme.desc: ''Annie'' - A sweet Terrier mix is matched up with a couple who are mourning the loss of their two previous dogs. Active Annie jumps at the chance to earn a place in their hearts, while simultaneously offering entertainment for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Lester
programme.desc: ''Lester'' - A two-month-old puppy could be the perfect match for a marketing executive with a passion for skateboarding. But before Lester can ride off into the sunset with his potential adopter, he must complete basic training.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Rocket
programme.desc: ''Rocket'' - Two off-roading enthusiasts seek a sidekick for their automotive activities. But before Rocket can be confirmed as their perfect puppy passenger, he must prove that he is all revved up about the family’s high-octane lifestyle.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Paris
programme.desc: ''Paris'' - A young Terrier mix could be just what the doctor ordered for a man who has anxiety. But in order for the match to be a success, Paris must be comfortable traveling alongside her new adopter as he enjoys his favorite activity—roller blading.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Reggie
programme.desc: ''Reggie'' - A large German Shepherd mix could offer companionship to a military family that’s still mourning the loss of their previous dog. But Reggie will need to prove that he can be a gentle playmate for the family’s two energetic young boys.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - King
programme.desc: ''King'' - A fishing enthusiast becomes downcast after a rare condition nearly leaves him paralyzed. But, happiness could be on the horizon as he hopes to hook the perfect catch: a canine companion and fishing buddy, named King.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Kiddo
programme.desc: ''Kiddo'' - A two-year-old Chihuahua mix could serve as the perfect social bridge for a young, newlywed couple that has Asperger’s Syndrome. But Kiddo will need to make it through basic training before he’ll be ready to join his new adopters.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Marley
programme.desc: ''Marley'' - A crafty couple thinks a six-month-old Beagle-Terrier mix could lift their spirits following a year that’s been marred by tragedy. But their hobbies could potentially stand in the way of the safe placement of an energetic young puppy.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - Special Skills
programme.desc: ''Special Skills'' - Four rescued shelter dogs learn special skills that will make them better matches for their new forever families.

programme.title: Lucky Dog - London
programme.desc: ''London'' - A young girl’s letter-writing campaign convinces her parents that she is ready for a new furry friend. But before a timid hound mix named London will be ready to join the family, she will need to come out of her shell.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A spunky little river meanders its way through an autumn hillside bursting with splashes of color, as only Bob Ross can create!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross gently places a little old church house upon a bed of snow in front of giant frost-covered mountains in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross allows the greenery of a deep grove to be barely visible in the light of early morning – all tucked inside an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Hurricane: The Anatomy - "Shaping the Wilderness"
programme.desc: Over millions of years, nature has evolved to deal with the strongest storms on the planet. This episode looks at varying strategies used by plants and animals that live in the hurricane zone and how they cope with the annual onslaught. From robust crocodiles, to fragile flamingos and delicate tropical shrimp, many species have found ingenious ways of dealing with storm devastation. Explore the tropics from the jungle canopy to subterranean caves and dive beneath the coral seas, as this film reveals that hurricanes can be both beneficial and catastrophic to individuals but, at the level of populations, the deadly storms provide new opportunities for life.

programme.title: History In The Making - "Morning Star/Microcar/Signet Ring"

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Truth of the Matter

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner - Paths of Destruction

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Richard Hammond dons his tuxedo for a special program honoring the heroes of Total Wipeout's fifth series. The presenter starts with the 'Best new obstacle award' and will be showing the top five, and the winner for each category. Don't miss out on this special episode because surely, it will make you have good laughs!

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: This is the first 'Celebrity Special' of the season. Today, Richard Hammond presents an extraordinary game show in which ten celebrities tackle one of television's most extreme obstacle courses to win 10,000 pounds for charity. Celebrities are Dalton Grant, Ricky Groves, Gail Emms, Charlie Stayt, Roxanne Pallett, Simon Day, Brian Belo, Camilla Dallerup, Nicola McLean and Julie Peasgood.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Time again for the world of celebrity to take on the world's most outrageous obstacle course in the name of charity, and in the name of slapstick entertainment! Richard Hammond and Amanda Byram watch the likes of Marcus Patric, Peter Duncan, Susie Amy, Chris Rankin, Donna Fraser, Clare Nasir, Neil Ruddock, Melissa Suffield, Lady Sovereign, and Dom try to make it to the Wipeout Zone.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Crashes, smashes and hilarious mud splashes are on the cards as ten celebrities from the world of sport, music and television take on one of the largest and most extreme obstacle courses in the world. They journey across the globe to the purpose-built Total Wipeout course in Argentina to put their strength, balance and bravery to the test in the hope of winning 10,000 pounds for charity.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: This is the second 'Celebrity Special' of the season. This time, all of them face 'The Qualifier' and 'The Crash Mountain' before the eliminations begin. Celebrities are Ali Bastian, Andy Akinwolere, Caroline Faraday, Dean Macey, Ian Watkins, James Redmond, Lisa Scott-Lee, Malandra Burrows, Martin Offiah and Tupele Dorgu.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Winter Wipeout reaches a suitably dramatic finale this week with Winter Wipeout: The Final. And when we say dramatic, we mean dramatic with added snow. The finest contestants from across the series -champions and losing finalists -once again hop on the flight to South America to take on the most arduous and extraordinary snow-clad, foam-padded obstacle course on Earth.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Acting has the Oscars. Singing has the Brits. Winter Wipeout has the awards show to end all awards shows -The Snow Globes. Join Richard Hammond on the red carpet for the highlights of the series as he takes us on a wintery journey handing icy trophies out along the way, ably assisted by Amanda Byram.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: 10 celebrities will be taking the reindeer-drawn celebrity sleigh to the top of the Qualifier, where Amanda Byram will be waiting with a pithy put-down and a barrel of laughs. From the warmth of the studio Richard Hammond will be commentating on the efforts of musical star Connie Fisher, snowy Olympic hero Eddie The Eagle Edwards and hearthrob boy-band songster Tony Mortimer from E17.

programme.title: School Of Golf (Instructional)
programme.desc: "Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator. Martin Hall reveals how one piece of wood can help break bad swing habits. Learn how to start the backswing like Bryson DeChambeau and develop extension through the ball like Jack Nicklaus with the use of a two-by-four."

programme.title: School Of Golf (Instructional)
programme.desc: "Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator. Martin Hall and GOLF social media correspondent Nikki B reveal how the average amateur can practice like the best players in the world. Learn why Padraig Harrington does the Happy Gilmore drill and how Ernie Els used a sponge ball to develop his big easy swing. Also, performance coach Iain Highfield teaches the proper way to think and practice to improve the game."

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: "The remaining contestants get creative and look to earn immunity by showing who's game is in the best shape. Some find out they may need more work than they thought. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida."

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: "The four remaining players vie for an advantage which will go a long way toward determining who will play in the championship match. Head-to-head competitions put a spotlight on the pressure faced in the season's penultimate episode. Hosts: Tom Abbott, Paige Mackenzie. From the Barefoot Resort and Golf in Myrtle Beach, SC."

programme.title: School Of Golf (Instructional)
programme.desc: "Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator. Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal discuss the role of the hands and how to use them through all parts of the swing. Learn what Tom Watson says is his number one swing key, and how household items such as a coat hanger can improve ball striking."

programme.title: School Of Golf (Instructional)
programme.desc: "Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator. The subject is golf. The teacher is Martin Hall. Each week the assignment is to improve your game. Along with co-host Nikki B, Martin covers everything from tee to green while answering viewer questions. Get your homework assignment to improve your game."

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: "A team is forced to overcome the odds of being severely outnumbered. Hosted by Tom Abbott and Stephanie Sparks from the IBEROSTAR Playa Paraiso Golf and Spa Resort."

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: "They won't be playing basketball, but their accuracy will be tested for sure as the Final Four contestants become the final three. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida."

programme.title: School Of Golf (Instructional)
programme.desc: "Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator. Martin Hall hits the range to teach how to correct, fat, thin, heel, and toe shots with the irons. Hall also shares his favorite drill for consistent solid contact and reveals a tip on how to improve from baseball pitchers."

programme.title: School Of Golf (Instructional)
programme.desc: "Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator. Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the setup and swing keys to driving it longer and straighter Martin reveals how to add more power just by changing your grip a swing tip from Annika Sorenstam a lesson on how archery can improve your driving."

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: "Contestants are forced to go long and see who's got the most confidence in their long game. Those who are successful will find out that confidence pays off. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida."

programme.title: The Big Break

programme.title: Stomping Grounds - Stomping Grounds - "Fishing Florida's Backcountry Wilderness"
programme.desc: Host Ryan McVinney takes Boat Trader fans on an indepth exploration of Florida flats fishing deep in the backcountry of Islamorada. Featuring Captain Eric Lund, a Wall Street Broker turned backcountry fishing guide, this episode reveals the key design features of the world’s best flats skiffs and how they are built for targeting some of the most exciting sportfish species on the planet. Also, covered are bay boats and their versatility for families exploring Florida’s coastal waterways, along with a detailed study of fish species and wildlife in the region. Some of the area’s most beautiful and secret locales show why Islamorada has earned the nickname of the Sportfish Capital of The World.

programme.title: Gale Force Twins - Gale Force Twins - "Our Final Catch Fishing For 4 Days And 3 Nights"
programme.desc: It's the FINAL morning. The sun hasn't risen yet but the mates are hard at work transferring the fish into bins in order to properly sort and distribute it to the anglers. As the sun begins to rise the anglers gather around with their coolers ready to collect their fish! After the coolers are full we say our goodbyes and head home but the work is NOT over yet....we still have to fillet our catch!

programme.title: The Chefs’ Line - Lebanese

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Who said struggle meals can’t be delicious? Don’t sleep on these 5-ingredient recipes – simple weeknight meals that are anything but boring, and with a few pantry staples, you’ll have dinner on the table in no time.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie teaches us a few easy and inventive “no-kitchen” hacks for delicious struggly meals. If you're dorm living or road tripping, it doesn’t mean you can’t make tasty meals from handy kitchen (and non-kitchen) appliances. No Kitchen? No problem.

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: It’s the dead of winter in Frankie’s kitchen, which means it’s that time for hearty, delicious, and warming homemade meals. So you’re saving more money, while you’re staying in, already saving money. It’s a winter miracle.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Cabbage has long been an underrated green on the field, and it’s about time Frankie gives it a starring role. This leafy head proves itself as the versatile ingredient we need it to be, affordable year around, delicious and filling.

programme.title: Beer Can Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: In this episode, we show how a few easy tricks can give an old standby, like roast chicken, a new lift.

programme.title: Chocolate Delights
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia uncover the secrets to making Foolproof All-Butter Pie Dough and Chocolate Cream Pie, and tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges Bridget to a tasting of cocoa powder. Finally, test cook Elle Simone makes Julia a decadent Dark Chocolate Fudge Sauce.

programme.title: The Perfect Cake
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia make the perfect Gingerbread Layer Cake and Keith Makes Sticky Toffee Pudding Cakes.

programme.title: Elegant Dinner Party

In the Equipment Corner, equipment expert Adam Ried reviews his top pick for twist corkscrews. Finally, test cook Dan Souza makes a decadent Duchess Potato Casserole.

programme.title: Holiday Feast
programme.desc: Test cook Ashley Moore shows host Bridget Lancaster how to make a Crumb-Crusted Rack of Lamb that is perfect for the holidays. Next, equipment expert Adam Ried shows host Julia Collin Davison his top picks of electric knives. Finally, test cook Christie Morrison shows Julia how to make a showstopping Brussels Sprout Gratin.

programme.title: Pub-Style Favorites, Revisited
programme.desc: Hosts Julia Collin Davison and Bridget Lancaster uncover the secrets to making the ultimate Pub-Style Steak and Ale Pie at home. Then, equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for knife blocks. Finally, test cook Keith Dresser makes Bridget perfect Boston Brown Bread.

programme.title: How to Roast Everything
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia teach viewers how to make the ultimate Beef Tenderloin with Smoky Potatoes and Persillade Relish. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges Bridget to a turkey tasting. Gadget critic Lisa McManus reviews fat separators, and then test cook Dan Souza makes Turkey Breast en Cocotte with Pan Gravy.

programme.title: Comfort Food Done Right
programme.desc: Test cook Christie Morrison and host Bridget Lancaster uncover the secrets to making a flavorful Double-Crust Chicken Pot Pie from scratch. Next, tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of creamy peanut butter. Finally, test cook Ashley Moore makes Julia a delicious First Lady specialty, Cowboy Cookies.

programme.title: Roast Beef and Potatoes
programme.desc: Test cook Natalie Estrada reveals the secrets to making a foolproof Classic Roast Beef Tenderloin with host Bridget Lancaster. Next, host Julia Collin Davison discovers equipment expert Adam Ried's top pick of tongs. Finally, test cook Lawman Johnson shows Julia how to make perfect Lyonnaise Potatoes.

programme.title: Italian Comfort Food Classics
programme.desc: Test cook Bryan Roof cooks host Julia Collin Davison a surprising Italian classic: Chicago Thin-Crust Pizza with Homemade Italian Sausage. Next, tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Bridget Lancaster to a live taste test of jarred pasta sauce. Finally, test cook Lawman Johnson and host Bridget reveal the secrets to a perfect Pasta Fagioli.

programme.title: Holiday Roast and Potatoes
programme.desc: Hosts Bridget Lancaster and Julia Collin Davison streamline a classic recipe for Boneless Rib Roast with Yorkshire Pudding and Jus. Then, tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges Bridget to a tasting of black tea. And finally, test cook Ashley Moore makes Bridget a family-favorite recipe for Lighthouse Inn Potatoes.

programme.title: Arroz con Pollo and Sour Orange Pie
programme.desc: Hosts Bridget Lancaster and Julia Collin Davison prepare a comfort food classic: Arroz con Pollo. Then, tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges Bridget to a tasting of store-bought whipped topping. And finally, test cook Christie Morrison reveals the steps to make a Florida favorite, Sour Orange Pie.

programme.title: Pork and Pierogi
programme.desc: Hosts Julia Collin Davison and Bridget Lancaster prepare a show-stopping special occasion Cider-Braised Pork Roast. Next, tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges Bridget to a sauerkraut tasting. Finally, test cook Bryan Roof teaches host Julia Collin Davison the secrets to tackling authentic Pittsburgh-style Potato-Cheddar Pierogi at home.

programme.title: Comfort Food Done Right
programme.desc: Test cook Christie Morrison and host Bridget Lancaster uncover the secrets to making a flavorful Double-Crust Chicken Pot Pie from scratch. Next, tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of creamy peanut butter. Finally, test cook Ashley Moore makes Julia a delicious First Lady specialty, Cowboy Cookies.

programme.title: Smoky Barbecue Favorites
programme.desc: Test cook Ashley Moore shows host Bridget Lancaster how to tackle Texas-sized, Thick Cut Smoked Pork Chops. Then, equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his pick for dry measuring cups. Finally, Julia Collin Davison reveals the secret to achieving the perfect Backyard Barbecue Beans.

programme.title: Ribs and Mashed Potatoes Revisited
programme.desc: Bridget Lancaster shares steps to achieving the perfect Memphis-style Wet Ribs in the Slow Cooker. Next, tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host, Julia Collin Davison to an apple-cider vinegar tasting. And finally, test cook Ashley Moore teaches Bridget how to make the leftover favorite, Mashed Potato Cakes from scratch.

programme.title: Ciao Italia - Dumplings to Die For
programme.desc: Mary Ann features Canederli with Speck, a fantastic dumpling-like recipe from the little-known Italian region of Trentino Aldo Adige. Filled with diced speck, this unique meat product adds an unmistakable, smoke-like flavor to the tender canederli, bobbing in broth. Perfect for a cold winter’s night.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa - Dinner Duet
programme.desc: Some foods are sexy because of their texture or flavor, and some are sexy because of how they're served. These are the foods we'd cook for a very important evening. A lush seafood stew with scallops, shrimp, mussels, clams and Pernod, a whole-leaf Caesar salad made to be eaten with your fingers, and a silken Caramel Panna Cotta. We'll visit Greystone, one of the oldest buildings in the valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa - Late Night Dining
programme.desc: We take you along to the biggest charity event in the Napa Valley and then come back home to make some late-night favorites: a home-style onion soup, a spicy spaghetti Amatriciana, and dried-fruit compote flavored with Sambuca.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa - Winter Favorites
programme.desc: When the temperature drops, foods should deepen in flavor. These are the dishes we make when it's cold outside. A Chicken Bolognaise that's lower in fat than the traditional version, Fennel Roasted Vegetables, and a cheesecake made with flavorful mascarpone.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa - Pesto Perfecto
programme.desc: Pesto is much more than basil and pine nuts. Learn the technique and make tomato pesto (with our infamous flowerpot chicken and bruschetta), walnut pesto and even your own pesto with the flavors you choose. Meet some olive growers who make olive oil in the Napa Valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa - Panzanella
programme.desc: Italians make this bread and vegetable salad in the summer with fresh tomatoes and garlic. We show how to make it all year long, with a springtime asparagus panzanella, a classic summer version, and with veal medallions to serve as a main course. We'll tour Main Street, St. Helena, and see some of the valley's most charming stores and restaurants.

programme.title: Taste of France - Pascal Barbot - Astrance
programme.desc: In today’s program we will visit the star-chef Pascal Barbot, who became independent at age twenty-seven. Reservations at his 2 star Michelin-awarded restaurant Astrance are booked months ahead. Pascal is truly passionate about cooking and puts emphasis on perfection in everything that he and his team does. He loves surprises, and also offers his customers this delight, with his surprise menu. In this program we’ll get to know Barbot and the values that permeate his work and relation with his producers and learn his secrets on how to cook like a star!

programme.title: Taste of France - Daniel Barratier – L’Auberge Sur-les-Bois
programme.desc: Daniel Barratier has worked with some of the best chefs traveling the world, now he’s back in his hometown, Annecy, the ”Venice of the French Alps" were he invested in a true fine dining restaurant. We’ll explore his life philosophy and also meet with his favorite pig farmer that started a trend that will change France forever.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen - Bacon or Pancetta
programme.desc: Chef Stellino attempts to answer the age old question - which is better - bacon or pancetta? Dishes include: Ragu' Di Gamberetti/ Shrimp Amatriciana with Pasta / Insalata Del Sogno / Watermelon Salad with Tomato and Bacon.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen - Family Matters
programme.desc: Chef Stellino recalls the charming quirks of his family in Italy and America. Dishes Include: Pasta All' Arrabbiata (Pasta with a spicy tomato sauce) / Salsicce Brasate con Broccoli e Peperoni (Braised sausages with broccoli and peppers) / Banana Cream Pudding.

programme.title: MIX - Old Favorites & Winery Tour
programme.desc: Tamee visits four of her favorite bars from seasons past to mix up more incredible cocktails.

programme.title: MIX - Cocktails And Movies
programme.desc: Tamee visits a secret hilltop cocktail lounge in Burbank CA. The cocktails created here have movie themes including Beauty & The Beast & Radars Of The Lost Ark. Chef Perry's unique bar bites make for an unforgettable experience at THE GREEN ROOM.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table - Loreto: Baja’s Hidden Gem
programme.desc: One of Baja’s most well-kept secrets has Pati on a mission to explore bite-by-bite. Loreto is a small town on the Gulf of California that almost feels like a step back in time. Pati visits the oldest mision in Baja California to learn about the town’s history. She can’t leave without trying a dish you can only get fresh in Baja — the indigenous almejas chocolatas or chocolate clams.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table - La Paz: The Heart of Baja Sur
programme.desc: Pati explores La Paz, the capital of Baja Sur. She swims with whale sharks in the crystal clear waters of the Sea of Cortez, then satiates the appetite she worked up at El Bismarkcito, a seafood institution on La Paz’s waterfront. She also stops to meet with Chef Carlos Valdez of Tatanka, a vivacious local chef with a sense of humor and some must-eat food.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table - Road Trippin’ with Javier Plascencia
Pati's Mexican Table - The Godmother of Cabo Cuisine
programme.desc: Pati visits the small town of Miraflores with Edith Jimenez, a culinary icon in Los Cabos. At age 15, starting out as a waitress, Edith decided she would one day own the restaurant where she worked and is now living her dream. Owner of both Edith’s Restaurant and The Office, she ensures the preservation of history and culture by consistently using recipes from locals in the area.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table - Los Cabos by Land & Sea
programme.desc: Pati sets out on the Sea of Cortez in search of the freshest, tastiest seafood Los Cabos has to offer. Along with Chef Guillermo Gomez of Cabo’s luxurious Esperanza hotel, Pati reels in a fresh catch and heads back to the shore. Pati grills up her catch-of-the-day beachside with Chef Guillermo, as they discuss the evolution of Cabo San Lucas from small fishing village to vacation destination.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, Indonesia. Meeting up with his old friend, Derice, Luke unearths the delicious delicacies of Chinatown, finding the experience a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke completes his street food journey in Jakarta, Indonesia where he visits a busy stall that’s been serving a traditional Indonesian salad since 1961. Luke indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the ‘King of Street Food’.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke discovers the unique flavours and culinary traditions of the Bai and Yai people in the historic towns of Dali and Shaxi in China's Yunnan Province.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke reaches the fabled town of Lijiang in China's Yunnan Province, where the nightlife reigns and a Naxi "aunty" teaches Luke how to cook a local speciality.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke journeys to Xishuangbana, where China meets Southeast Asia, to experience Dai culture and cuisines, and try the acquired tastes of the famous tea horse trail.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke discovers the little known foods and flavours of Yangon – the former capital city of Myanmar.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke ventures to the Shan State, where entire villages and kilometres of tomato farms float upon Inle Lake.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke hikes to the hill tribe villages of the Shan State and the township of Keng Tung, where he cooks some unusual delicacies and local marketplace favourites.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke makes it to the town of Chiang Khong in northern Thailand, where he literally catches the ingredients for his traditional Tom Yum fish soup and tasty northern-style frog curry.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke arrives at mountainous Mae Salong, where he prepares a rustic tomato dish with Apear, an Aka grandmother.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke stays in Luang Prabang to join the biggest New Years celebrations in the country.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke heads north to Laos food capital, Luang Prabang, where he explores the city's fresh produce markets and unique cottage industries, trying his hand at making buffalo patties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke begins his culinary journey in Vientiane, the very laid back capital city of Laos.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke hits the bustling town of Chiang Mai, where he laps up the nightlife cooking Thai classics, such as green papaya salad.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke makes it to the town of Chiang Khong in northern Thailand, where he literally catches the ingredients for his traditional Tom Yum fish soup and tasty northern-style frog curry.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke arrives at mountainous Mae Salong, where he prepares a rustic tomato dish with Apear, an Aka grandmother.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Greater Mekong
programme.desc: Luke stays in Luang Prabang to join the biggest New Years celebrations in the country.

programme.title: Great Wide Open
programme.desc: A celebration of America's National Parks and the incredible adventurers who explore them.

programme.title: Kung Fu Motion - Hip Hop Stilts
programme.desc: Harry doesn't know how to stilt walk but within 5 days he will have to crash course the basics and advance to hip-hop stilt-walking in order to perform to a critical audience in China.

programme.title: Kung Fu Motion - Rolling Lamp
programme.desc: Putting to the test all his muscles including scalp and tongue, Harry must balance a bowl of burning oil on his head while making a mockery of himself in a Sichuan opera.

programme.title: Kung Fu Motion - Lion Dance
programme.desc: Harry has to hold a horse stance, move like a cat and capture the spirit of the lion before he is allowed to perform Lion Dancing at a troupe's 190th anniversary celebrations.

programme.title: Kung Fu Motion - Man Juggling
programme.desc: Harry joins the Shandong Acrobatic Troupe famous for juggling with their feet fellow team mates to form a towering pyramid of men.

programme.title: Kung Fu Motion - Beijing Opera
programme.desc: Harry faces his toughest challenge yet as he puts aside his free-styling ways to conform to the precision moves required of the Monkey King character in Beijing Opera.

programme.title: Easter Island: Mysteries of a Lost World
programme.desc: The contrast between the majestic statues of Easter Island and the desolation of their surroundings is stark. For decades, Easter Island has been seen as a warning for the planet as a whole: exhaust natural resources and the collapse of civilisation is inevitable. But Dr Jago Cooper believes that this is a disastrous misreading of what happened on Easter Island. Far from being a failure, the culture was a success story - and the real reasons for its demise were not the actions of its people.

programme.title: Building the Dream - Loughborough
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton comes to the aid of Liz and Craig in Loughborough, who can't agree on what the dream home they're building in their back garden should look like - traditional or contemporary?

programme.title: Building the Dream - Scottish Borders
programme.desc: Charlie heads for the Cotswolds and Mandy and Tony Slater’s ambitions self-build on a steep slope on a tight budget.

programme.title: 60 Minute Makeover - Battersea, London

programme.desc: Extreme isolation takes its toll on the remaining participants in the wild.

programme.title: Alone: Triumph
programme.desc: Two men remain on Vancouver Island as the storm of the year blows in.

programme.title: Alone: Alone: Making the Cut
programme.desc: Meet the 10 new participants on ALONE season 2 and see what it takes to make the cut. From exhaustive skills tests to camera and safety training.

programme.title: Alone: Once More Unto the Breach
programme.desc: The first day of the adventure begins, with 10 people prepared to head out into unknown wilderness and survive for as long as they can, in total isolation.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Great Gatsby Bride
programme.desc: David Tutera meets a bride who wants a 1920's inspired wedding, and yet she doesn't have any reception space and she's three weeks away from the big day! Can David, wedding planner to the stars, pull off a Great Gatsby event to remember?

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Spring Bride
programme.desc: David Tutera meets a bride that has lists for her lists and then more lists. While she wants a springtime wedding, if she continues to resist letting go and handing over the steering wheel to David, we might see this bride left out in the cold.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Poker Bride
programme.desc: Meet a bride that loves all things Vegas, and plans on wearing a light up dice garter. Will David Tutera be able to convert NJ to the best of Las Vegas in less than three short weeks?

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Zen Bride
programme.desc: Planning a wedding usually involves some chaos, even for David Tutera. But he's about to meet a bride whose zen themed wedding has her so calm, David has to pull out all the stops to get her out of her comfort zone.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Swamp Bride
programme.desc: What is David Tutera to do with a bride who's dream wedding theme is "swamp?" This is a first for David, and with only three weeks until the wedding, he's either going to sink or swim.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Diva Bride
programme.desc: They say everything is bigger in Texas, and so is the personality of David's new Dallas bride. When she says "diva," you better say 'licious," because she's a force to be reckoned with both her temperament and her posse are fierce.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Cowgirl Bride
programme.desc: With many brides, the dress is the most important thing for her wedding. But with David Tutera's next bride -- it's all about the cowboy boots. This Texas cowgirl is dead set on two stepping her way off into the sunset.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Pirate Bride
programme.desc: David Tutera has planned plenty of destination weddings, but never met a bride pleading for "Pirates of the Caribbean" themed nuptials. With only 21 days to go, missing the mark on this one might mean David will be walking the plank!

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Purple Princess Bride
programme.desc: Every bride dreams of having a fairytale wedding, especially David Tutera's latest bride. But no sooner does he introduce his talent for styles fit for a king, he gets pushback. What this bride sees as regal, David sees as a royal disaster!

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Butterfly Bride
programme.desc: David Tutera's latest bride explains that to envelop her guests in her favorite fly habitat, as found in nature, would be her dream come true. With every success, David brings surprises. In this case, the shock and awe comes full circle.

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: The Art Of Deception
programme.desc: Vito, a marketing and advertising mogul, goes undercover as a struggling artist. But when he's too successful at playing the directionless creative type, will it scare away the ambitious woman he falls for?

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: The Lonely Surfer
programme.desc: Ethan, a software CEO, goes undercover as a surf instructor. He makes his date suspicious when he forgets where he lives, and surfs terribly. How will she respond when he reveals that it's all been a lie?

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: Fitness Mogul Strips Down
programme.desc: Greg, an international fitness model, goes undercover as a landscaper. Greg falls hard for a blind date, but his friends spot a jealous streak. The questions really begin when she sees him shirtless at work...

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: Tip Your Bartender With Xo
programme.desc: Mick, the young president of his family's candle empire, goes undercover as a bartender. After three high-energy blind dates, he meets a girl who lights his fire - and does he really propose??

programme.title: Swimsuit Secrets Revealed: Swimsuit Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: A fashion expert gives us a look at the latest bathing suit trends, both dos & don'ts, resulting in makeovers for a few beachgoers.

programme.title: Love Blows: Annie'S Secret
programme.desc: Annie is enraged to find her mom called her ex-boyfriend. Nikki steals Annie's client - Chicago's Most Eligible Bachelor. Lisa calls Patti Stanger (Million Dollar Matchmaker) for help.

programme.title: Love Blows: Patti Goes Nuclear
programme.desc: Patti Stanger (Million Dollar Matchmaker) grills the LuvBiz team and explodes on the recruiters. Jim and Lisa face their toughest client. Nikki gets wasted. Jim fears Annie's idea may backfire.

programme.title: Love Blows: Indecent Proposals
programme.desc: Nikki's proposal shocks Lisa. Patti grills hot men for Annie's surprise mixer. John goes undercover on a date with LuvBiz's toughest client. Nikki blackmails Lisa.

programme.title: Love Blows: The Naughty Box
programme.desc: Patti Stanger (Million Dollar Matchmaker) shocks Annie with a surprise mixer. Annie snubs Rusty when she dates someone new. Jim fears the plot to set up Patti could ruin LuvBiz, so he sabotages it.

programme.title: Love Blows: Double Crossed
programme.desc: Patti Stanger flips out when she finds out Lisa set her up, and the future of LuvBiz may be at risk. Frisky Nikki scares virgin client. Rusty and Annie get heated over their secret romance.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 18 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''18 Chefs Compete'' - The new contestants form two teams and make their signature dishes for Chef Ramsay. A large audience looks on at the Cinerama Dome theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 17 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''17 Chefs Compete'' - This episode's challenge? Re-create Chef Ramsay's geoduck sashimi. The team that prepares fifteen perfect dishes gets a pool break while the losing team makes dinner for everyone.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 16 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''16 Chefs Compete'' - In a challenge to improve communication skills, Chef Ramsay gives each contestant a jacket with a recipe printed on the back, which they need to rely on their teammates to read.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 15 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''15 Chefs Compete'' - The teams serve brunch to a class of graduating culinary students. The winners fly to San Francisco to dine at Atelier Crenn the losers grind and stuff chorizo sausages.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 14 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''14 Chefs Compete'' - The chefs must identify mystery proteins and match them to dishes. The winners meet Olympic gold medalists at the Annenberg Community Beach House.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 13 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''13 Chefs Compete'' - The contestants split into pairs and capture animals. The chefs have to prepare a side to go with the protein that they just caught.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 12 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''12 Chefs Compete'' - The teams create six Italian opera-inspired dishes. The winners go on a shopping spree at American Rag Cie, while the losers break down squid for a squid-ink tortellini dish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 11 Chefs Compete (Part One)
programme.desc: ''11 Chefs Compete (Part One)'' - Dogs and trainers from American Kennel Club drop by Hell's Kitchen. Meanwhile, the teams create a tasting menu consisting of two appetizers and three entrées.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 11 Chefs Compete (Part Two)
programme.desc: ''11 Chefs Compete (Part Two)'' - The teams participate in a "Hell's Kitchen craps" challenge. The winners take a private jet to Las Vegas and stay at the Planet Hollywood resort and casino.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 9 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: '' 9 Chefs Compete'' - After an impressive Bollywood dance performance, Ramsay challenges the chefs to make Indian cuisine. The winners get a spa day while the losers prepare for the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 8 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''8 Chefs Compete'' - The remaining contestants take the annual blind taste test. The winners enjoy a day of rest and relaxation at the Santa Monica Pier, while the losers clean the dorms and kitchens.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Chappy's - Chappy's
programme.desc: The owners of Chappy’s, a Cajun-style restaurant, had to move in the wake of Hurricane Katrina. Now in Nashville, they’re struggling to find a loyal base of customers.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Kingston Cafe - Kingston Cafe
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay makes a trip to Pasadena, California to whip an eatery specializing in Caribbean cuisine into shape.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Mojito's - Mojito's
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visits Mojito's, a Cuban eatery in Brooklyn. The owners purchased the restaurant as newlyweds, but they are now seven years into a crumbling marriage and business.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Fleming - Fleming
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visits Fleming, a Danish eatery in Miami. The stubborn owner doesn't want to update the place and Ramsay discovers something in the cooler that leads him to close the restaurant.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Lela's - Lela's
programme.desc: Lela's is an upscale restaurant in desperate need of clientele. When Chef Ramsay starts criticizing the menu, the executive chef sees red, leading to a showdown in front of the staff.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Hannah and Mason's - Hannah and Mason's
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visits French bistro Hannah and Mason's. Owned by two friends who lack business skills and motivation, the restaurant administers bounced checks to the staff.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Le Bistro - Le Bistro
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay drops by a French eatery and discovers that he and the head chef have similar culinary training. However, the chef is in denial about the poor quality of his restaurant's food.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: The Secret Garden - The Secret Garden
programme.desc: The Secret Garden is a romantic French restaurant that is on the brink of bankruptcy. Chef Ramsay causes a stir as he suggests changing the ugly décor, the menu and the filthy kitchen.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: La Frite - La Frite
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay treks to Sherman Oaks, California to rescue a French eatery from peril as the brother-sister owners feud over the restaurant.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Kati Allo - Kati Allo
programme.desc: The husband-and-wife owners of Kati Allo, a Greek restaurant in Queens, New York, struggle to keep their eatery — and their marriage — together.

programme.title: Milton Lodge
programme.desc: Back for an eighth series, award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi faces up to one of her biggest challenges yet in the shape of an eccentric 79-year-old, Terry Connor, owner of The Milton Lodge. Can Alex turn the hotel’s insecure future around?

programme.title: Worlington
programme.desc: Sisters Joy and Sharon bought a delightful hotel that turned into a money pit, eating into their savings and time. Ruth helped revive their fortunes but, when she returns, will they have gone strength to strength or given up?

programme.title: The Lenchford Inn
programme.desc: This week, Alex heads to an attractive pub hotel on the banks of the River Severn in Worcestershire. The views may be picturesque but this establishment is far from tranquil. The Lenchford Inn is managed by two couples on the brink of a breakdown. Dave and Marie, along with her brother Ian and his wife Wendy, bought the inn thinking it would be a ticket to early retirement. But the combination of four floods in two years and the owners’ inexperience has left their hopes in tatters. The nine bedrooms and 80-seat restaurant are as empty as their bank accounts and, with a ten-year age difference between the two couples, they cannot see eye-to-eye on anything.

programme.title: RUGBY
programme.desc: Twenty-eight year old entrepreneur Raman Bal believed the twenty-five bedroomed Grosvenor Hotel would provide the building block for his new business empire. But £600,000 later and his dream of world domination is crumbling.

programme.title: Tasburgh
programme.desc: Ruth Watson travels to Bath to meet Sue, the owner of an award-winning hotel that has everything but guests. Sue’s running out of money fast but can Ruth rescue her hotel in time? And how will she handle Ruth’s no-nonsense approach?

programme.title: Crown Inn
programme.desc: Award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi meets the 57-year-old owner of The Crown Inn, a Peak District hotel that’s going downhill fast... Can Alex act as both peacemaker as well as pathfinder to discover a way out of the financial disaster?

programme.title: Woodlands Lodge Hotel
programme.desc: Young couple Rob & Elly bought the Haven with a dream of turning it into Great Yarmouth’s first 5 star guest house, but their dream has turned into a nightmare. After just three months in business they’d built up massive debts and had no guests, so they turned to Ruth Watson. She took them back to school, including a trip to her own award winning hotel, but could she get ambitious Elly to be realistic?

programme.title: The Crown Inn
programme.desc: The Hotel Inspector visits The Crown Inn and faces her biggest challenge to date! Since current owner Karen Lloyd took over the helm two and a half years ago, this historic coaching inn is failing dismally and Karen is desperate for help.

programme.title: Sunnyside Hotel
programme.desc: The Hotel Inspector meets the owners of Sunnyside Hotel, Julie and David, who are teetering on the edge of bankruptcy with a pitiful 20 percent occupancy, but have an audacious plan to spend themselves out of trouble!

programme.title: HOLLYBUSH INN, HAYE ON WYE
programme.desc: This week, the hippie dream becomes a nightmare for the Hotel Inspector.57 year old ‘Healer’ Barbara Lewthwaite dreams of creating a laid back, ethical, nature friendly holiday retreat at the 18th Century Hollybush Inn in Hay-On-Wye, with Tepees.

programme.title: The Astor
programme.desc: As The Hotel Inspector strives to transform the fortunes of struggling guest houses across Britain, Alex Polizzi turns her attention to The Astor Hotel in Plymouth, but finds herself in conflict with the establishment's headstrong owner.

programme.title: Project Runway - Sink or Swim
programme.desc: "Sink or Swim" - In the Heidi Klum Swimwear Challenge, the designers create their own fabric to use in crafting a stylish swimsuit. The winner will have their design sold as part of Heidi's swimwear line! But the contestants lack of swimsuit experience makes for a harder challenge than expected.

programme.title: Project Runway - There's No "I" in "Team"
programme.desc: "There's No "I" in "Team"" - In the season's first Team Challenge, the designers exercise their business savvy when they pitch their collection ideas to raise money from a group of mystery investors. The stakes are raised when they learn that the winning team members will each receive $5,000, and the winner will be featured in Marie Claire magazine!

programme.title: Project Runway - There IS Crying in Fashion
programme.desc: "There IS Crying in Fashion" - The designers are excited to attend a press event, but their festive mood is quickly spoiled when the party turns out to be a challenge. The misdirect proves to be more than most of the designers can handle, as many of them have to start their looks over completely when criticized by a disappointed Tim Gunn. Emily Ratajkowski joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway - Welcome to the Urban Jungle
programme.desc: "Welcome to the Urban Jungle" - The exhausted designers are whisked away to Universal Studios Orlando to recharge their batteries with a roller coaster or two. They are then challenged to find inspiration from their experience at the theme park to design a look for the “Urban Jungle.” Guest judge Rebecca Minkoff joins.

programme.title: Project Runway - Project Pop-Up
programme.desc: "Project Pop-Up " - The designers are faced with their second Team Challenge of the season and must work together to create 3-piece collections to be shown in a SoHo pop-up shop. However, working in teams leads to tensions and tantrums as the designers struggle to have their voices heard. Guest judge Kelly Osbourne returns.

programme.title: Project Runway - Life is Full of Surprises
programme.desc: "Life is Full of Surprises" - The designers are pleasantly surprised when each one of them gets a special guest from home. But the emotional reunions with their mothers, daughters, and friends are quickly overshadowed by the drama of the next challenge when the designers learn that their newly arrived loved ones will also be their clients—and there is $50,000 on the line! Olivia Culpo and Katia Beauchamp join the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway - A Power Trip
programme.desc: "A Power Trip" - The designers take a majestic helicopter ride high above NYC for inspiration for their next challenge: to create an editorial, high fashion look for Marie Claire magazine. Guest judges Anne Fulenwider and Camilla Belle join the panel.

programme.title: Project Runway - Go Bold or Go Home
programme.desc: "Go Bold or Go Home" - The designers are challenged to draw inspiration from metal and machinery for their next look. However, in another Project Runway first, they must create their avant-garde design using the metallic unconventional materials, as well as conventional materials from Mood. Shiri Appleby joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway - Keeping it Weird
programme.desc: "Keeping it Weird" - In the final challenge before Fashion Week, the designers take a surprise trip to Austin, Texas, where the city’s unofficial slogan is “Keep Austin Weird!” Once there, the designers are faced with an Unconventional Materials Challenge, leading them to create amazing (and weird!) pieces with the knowledge that the losing designer will be sent home just one step away from Fashion Week. Guest judge Priyanka Chopra joins.

programme.title: Project Runway - Finale Part 1
programme.desc: "Finale Part 1" - After heading home to work on their Fashion Week collections, the designers are visited by Tim, who is not impressed with everything they have created so far. The designers return to NYC and present the judges with three pieces from their collection, and all of them realize how much work they have left before presenting all of their pieces at Fashion Week. Michael Kors returns as a guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway - Finale Part 2
programme.desc: "Finale Part 2" - Fashion Week is finally here, and the designers rush to put the final touches on their collections. Four designers will have their dream of showing at New York Fashion Week, but only one designer will reach the ultimate goal of being crowned the next Project Runway winner! Guest judge Zendaya joins the panel.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Heavy Hitters
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Ruffians and Wrestlers
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Everybody Just a Child?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Matt & Froy Auto Recovery
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: We Weren't Informed
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Lyndah's Revenge
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior. Finally, the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck, but at what cost does revenge come?

programme.title: El Prisionero
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: The Final Showdown
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession. There's only one problem: it belongs to somebody who is like family to them.

programme.title: What the Truck?!?
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: After recovering their stolen truck, the reunited repo team is on pins and needles to hold their shaky alliance together.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Daddy's Little Girl
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy come face to face with the world's most ornery baker and come away a little worse for wear, and Matt and Froy get in way over their heads when they attempt a repo at a high-octane truck racing track.

programme.title: The Junior Partner
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: Hard Turns Ahead
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business, Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team, or the beginning of its undoing?

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The Challenge is a reality competition battle across a series of contests for the chance to win money. Contestants endure brutal challenges, devastating elimination rounds, steamy hookups and bitter rivalries.

programme.desc: The Challenge is a reality competition battle across a series of contests for the chance to win money. Contestants endure brutal challenges, devastating elimination rounds, steamy hookups and bitter rivalries.

programme.title: MTV Floribama Shore
programme.desc: "MTV Floribama Shore" is the story of eight young adults who come to spend the summer in the hottest beach town on the Gulf Coast, Panama City Beach, to party it up and put the real world on hold for just a little bit longer.

programme.title: Life Risking Romance
programme.desc: What would you do if the love of your life were a serial killer? A crime novel writer Han Jane has become a nuisance to her neighbors by often mistaking her neighbors as suspects of crime. One day, she hears someone’s scream from upstairs and decides that the person upstairs is the serial killer on loose. While Jane keeps pursuing the serial killer with help of Jason and her childhood friend, she witnesses a shocking scene that changes everything she had believed so far.

programme.title: The Grand Heist
programme.desc: When corrupt officials corner the ice market, a gang of 11 professionals of various fields sets out on a mission to rob ice blocks from their storage.

programme.title: The Throne (HELLBOUND's Yoo Ah-In & PARASITE's Song Kang-Ho)
programme.desc: In the year of 1762, when King Yeong Jo of the Joseon dynasty's been ruling for 35 years already, Crown prince Sa Do is accused of plotting treason by his biological mother lady Yi. King Yeong Jo falls into a dilemma since he could not penalize his own son as a traitor as it would mean that he would become the father of a traitor threatening his throne, and ends up ordering Sa Do to take his own life. As Sa Do’s lieges oppose King Yeong Jo’s decision by putting their own lives at risk, King Yeong Jo locks Sa Do in a wooden rice chest to kill him.

programme.title: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: A former cop receives a letter from a prisoner on death row. He reluctantly takes on the case when he learns that it is linked with his ex-rival.

programme.title: I'M LIVE: S1 E237
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of the Christmas Special, the Year-End Special, and the New-Year Special, and the guest of the Year-End Special Episode is Kwon Jin ah. Kwon Jin ah is known for her tranquil and heartwarming voice that genuinely comforts our hearts. In February this year, she released her first self-produced EP, “The Way For Us,” and showed off her capabilities as a songwriter and producer as well. In this episode, Kwon Jin ah performs “KNOCK,” “This Winter,” and her solo version of “Hello Antenna, Hello Christmas,” the carol jointly released by musicians on the record label Antenna. Also famous for her live singing skills and ticket-selling power, this artist is bound to melt our souls during this cold winter season. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene, including Jannabi, 10CM, HYUKOH, SE SO NEON, CNBLUE, Jeongmilla, BIBI, NIve, and Lydia Lee, have participated in the show. Also, only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.title: After School Club: S1 E533 - MCND
programme.desc: The Fun and Dynamic group MCND! MCND is back with ‘#MOOD’, the song about the MZ generation’s story. And they are coming to ASC. Far apart, but together in heart! We’ve got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don’t hesitate!

programme.title: The Female Friend Among Guys 2
programme.desc: Ji-hye was sprinting and bumps into Ho-tae and breaks his phone. Ho-tae demands Ji-hye to pay him for repair expenses, but Ji-hye, who was in dire need for a bathroom, unintentionally ends up running away from Ho-tae, and arrives at a bathroom with no toilet paper. Ji-hye averts the crisis with toilet paper given to her by Seok-ju, who she has never met before, and she ends up selling her laptop to Jin-hee to pay for Ho-tae’s screen repair costs, but ends up losing the money she got from selling her laptop. This group ends up becoming best friends with one another through a random incident… From high school to marriage, who will Ji-hye end up marrying among them?

programme.title: I'M LIVE: S1 E238
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of the Christmas Special, the Year-End Special, and the New-Year Special, and the guest of the New-Year Special Episode is Juk Jae. Juk Jae is a guitarist-turned-singer-songwriter, known for his lyrical and ambient songs with a guitar sound. Since his debut in 2014, he has collaborated with numerous singers, including IU and Zion T and has also released many hit songs, but he is still determined to show his transformation and growth through music. As part of that effort, he hosts the audio show “Juk Jae's Night Time Studio” and also went on his first concert tour across Korea in November last year. In this New-Year Special Edition, Juk Jae performs “Let’s Go See The Stars,” “Sky Dream,” “One Another” and more to amaze our ears and souls. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene, including Jannabi, 10CM, HYUKOH, SE SO NEON, CNBLUE, Jeongmilla, BIBI, NIve, and Lydia Lee, have participated in the show. Also, only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In the tiny, rural town of Carthage, TX, assistant funeral director Bernie Tiede was one of the town's most beloved residents. He taught Sunday school, sang in the church choir and was always willing to lend a helping hand. Everyone loved and appreciated Bernie, so it came as no surprise when he befriended Marjorie Nugent, an affluent widow who was as well known for her sour attitude as her fortune. Bernie frequently traveled with Marjorie and even managed her banking affairs. Marjorie quickly became fully dependent on Bernie and his generosity and Bernie struggled to meet her increasing demands. Bernie continued to handle her affairs, and the townspeople went months without seeing Marjorie. The people of Carthage were shocked when it was reported that Marjorie Nugent had been dead for some time, and Bernie Tiede was being charged with the murder.

programme.desc: "Sixty-Five on the Aisle" - Lou Marie buys theater and train tickets for sixty-five people from Brewster to see Ann in a play. A conflict arises between the producers who do not want them leaving the theater during a scene.

programme.title: That Girl - Call of the Wild
programme.desc: "Call of the Wild" - A commercial director tells Anne she has a face that no housewife would feel threatened by, which makes her wonder if she has any sex appeal.

programme.title: That Girl - The Other Woman
programme.desc: "The Other Woman" - Ann suggests that her father escort Ethel Merman to a formal event, and the tabloids make him look like her new boyfriend.

programme.title: That Girl - He and She and He
programme.desc: "He and She and He" - Still obsessed with Ann, Noel Prince returns to New York to try to get her to marry him.

programme.title: That Girl - Odpdypahimcaifss
programme.desc: "Odpdypahimcaifss" - A scandal erupts when Donald's mother is invited to Ann's place and finds his pants in her closet.

programme.title: That Girl - Great Guy
programme.desc: "Great Guy" - Ann is worried about Pete's new boyfriend George (Albert Salmi), a jock who doesn't necessarily treat her like a lady.

programme.title: That Girl - The Detective Story
programme.desc: "The Detective Story" - A series of obscene phone calls prompts Ann to call the NYPD, who sends over a detective who seems to be getting a little too close for comfort, especially Donald's.

programme.title: That Girl - If You Were Almost the Only Man in the World
programme.desc: "If You Were Almost the Only Man in the World" - After being hit by a fly ball at a baseball game, Ann meets a doctor who bears a striking resemblance to Donald.

programme.title: That Girl - Just Spell the Name Right
programme.desc: "Just Spell the Name Right" - Ann hires press agent Eddie Edwards (Jessie White) to boost her career, but his method of doing so involves naming her in the divorce of one of her former soap opera co-stars (Robert Alda).

programme.title: That Girl - The Beard
programme.desc: "The Beard" - After a hunting trip, Donald decides to grow a beard, which doesn't necessarily turn Ann on.

programme.title: That Girl - The Drunkard
programme.desc: "The Drunkard" - Ann helps sober up a comedian who thinks that they had an affair.

programme.title: That Girl - Old Man's Darling
programme.desc: "Old Man's Darling" - An elderly man who ruins Ann's dress gets her a new one, but he keeps buying her gifts which she feels that she can't accept.

programme.title: That Girl - Sock It to Me
programme.desc: "Sock It to Me" - Ann's opportunity to perform in a Broadway play opposite Barry Sullivan is jeopardized by her inability to slap him.
